expectations.text: Output has at least 3 markdown H2/H3 sections (evidence of multi-angle coverage)
expectations.evidence: 6 H2 sections: SQLite Architecture, PostgreSQL Architecture, Scalability/Concurrency/Migration, Selection Criteria, Key Takeaways, Sources

expectations.text: Mentions concurrency or write contention as a tradeoff
expectations.evidence: Extensive: dedicated section on 'The core scaling constraint: writes', SQLITE_BUSY errors, single-writer model, MVCC
Full section on scalability; discusses horizontal scaling, single-server ceiling, and the 'might grow' decision framework

expectations.text: Provides a concrete recommendation or decision guidance
expectations.evidence: Explicit 'Choose SQLite if' / 'Choose PostgreSQL if' lists, plus a pragmatic heuristic ('start with SQLite; graduate when SQLITE_BUSY appears')

expectations.text: Has a key takeaways or summary section
expectations.evidence: ## Key Takeaways section with 5 numbered bullets

notes: Strong output with real-world case study (DeployStack), sourced URLs, WAL tuning discussion, and 2025-2026 ecosystem context. The multi-agent decomposition added the 'modern SQLite ecosystem' angle that wouldn't naturally appear in a single-shot answer.
